description: E2E tests for individual tool behaviors. Each case sends a natural-language prompt and verifies the LLM invokes the expected tool(s) with correct results.

cases.name: FileRead_reads_known_file
cases.description: Ask to read a known file and verify FileRead is used and content is returned.

steps.send: 读取 README.md 文件的内容，并告诉我它的前两行写了什么。

cases.name: FileWrite_and_FileRead_roundtrip
cases.description: Ask to write a temp file, then read it back.

steps.send: 在 {{TMP}}/e2e_test_write.txt 创建一个文件，内容为 'Hello from E2E test'。
读取 {{TMP}}/e2e_test_write.txt 的内容

cases.name: FileEdit_modifies_existing_file
cases.description: Write a file, then edit it, then verify the edit.

steps.send: 创建 {{TMP}}/e2e_test_edit.txt，内容为 'old_value = 1\nsecond_line = 2'
把 {{TMP}}/e2e_test_edit.txt 中的 old_value = 1 改成 new_value = 100
读取 {{TMP}}/e2e_test_edit.txt 验证修改

cases.name: Glob_finds_files_by_pattern
cases.description: Ask to find files matching a pattern.

steps.send: 查找 src/pilotcode/tools 目录下所有以 _tool.py 结尾的文件

cases.name: Grep_searches_text_pattern
cases.description: Ask to search for a text pattern across files.

steps.send: 在 src/pilotcode/tools 目录搜索包含 'class Tool' 定义的文件

cases.name: Bash_ls_on_unix
cases.description: Use Bash to list files (Unix only).

steps.send: 用 Bash 命令列出当前目录下的子目录

cases.name: Bash_echo_and_pipe
cases.description: Use Bash echo and pipe (Unix only).

steps.send: 运行 bash 命令：echo 'e2e-bash-test' | tr 'a-z' 'A-Z'

cases.name: Bash_pwd_returns_cwd
cases.description: Use Bash pwd to verify working directory (Unix only).

steps.send: 运行 pwd 命令告诉我当前工作目录

cases.name: PowerShell_GetChildItem_on_windows
cases.description: Use PowerShell to list items (Windows only).

steps.send: 用 PowerShell 列出当前目录的内容

cases.name: GitStatus_shows_repo_state
cases.description: Ask for git status in a temporary repo.

steps.send: 查看 {{TMP}}/git_test_repo 的 git 状态

cases.name: GitLog_shows_recent_commits
cases.description: Ask for recent git log in a temporary repo.

steps.send: 查看 {{TMP}}/git_test_repo 最近的 2 条 git 提交记录

cases.name: ToolSearch_finds_available_tools
cases.description: Ask to search for available tools.

steps.send: 搜索有哪些和文件相关的工具可以用

cases.name: TodoWrite_creates_todo_list
cases.description: Ask to create a todo list.

steps.send: 创建一个待办列表：1. 分析代码结构 2. 运行测试 3. 提交修改

cases.name: Sleep_delays_execution
cases.description: Ask to sleep for a short time.

steps.send: 等待 1 秒钟

cases.name: CodeIndex_and_CodeSearch
cases.description: Index the codebase and search for a symbol.

steps.send: 索引 src/pilotcode 目录的代码库
搜索符号 'QueryEngine' 的定义位置

cases.name: Brief_summarizes_text
cases.description: Ask to summarize a long text.

steps.send: 读取 README.md，然后用 Brief 工具把它总结成两句话
查看当前的默认模型配置是什么

cases.name: ApplyPatch_applies_diff
cases.description: Write a file and apply a patch.

steps.send: 创建 {{TMP}}/e2e_patch_target.txt，内容为 'line1\nline2\nline3'
对 {{TMP}}/e2e_patch_target.txt 应用补丁，把 line2 改成 modified_line2
读取 {{TMP}}/e2e_patch_target.txt 验证补丁
查看当前的定时任务列表
